name: Shenzhen Sunmoon Microelectronics Co., Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Sunmoon Microelectronics Co., Ltd is a China-based company specializing in the design, development, and sales of integrated circuits (ICs). They focus on power management ICs and other analog and mixed-signal ICs for various applications. Shenzhen Sunmoon Microelectronics Co., Ltd is headquartered in China.
